source: Target volume (150/day) is a documented assumption representing a mid-size ED, grounded in NHAMCS 2022 national ED visit rate (47 per 100 people/year). Synthea's population was too small (5000 patients, ~2.24 recent-year arrivals/day) to provide a realistic absolute rate directly. Hourly distribution shape is retained from Synthea as it remains valid independent of population size.
